description_long: This is an elegant, vintage-style chaise with a high, tufted backrest adorned with ornate carved detailing at the crest. The upholstery is a light, neutral fabric, possibly a pale beige or cream, with a subtle pattern and a smooth, matte finish. The seat is wide and comfortably padded, accompanied by a set of decorative cushions in various shapes, including round, rectangular, and square, all matching the main upholstery. Both armrests are gently curved and upholstered, seamlessly integrated into the overall frame, which features a classic cabriole leg design with carved accents. The back of the chaise is fully upholstered and plain, with a gentle arch at the top. This piece exudes a refined, antique charm suitable for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, boutique storefronts, or park pavilions.
description: A vintage-style, tufted chaise with ornate carved details, light upholstery, and decorative cushions, featuring curved armrests and cabriole legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gently curved armrest, thick seat cushion, and layered decorative pillows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the tufted backrest, ornate crest, and symmetrical arrangement of cushions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain, fully upholstered back with a gentle arch and no visible tufting or decoration.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and gently curved, featuring deep diamond tufting with buttons and an ornate carved crest at the top center. The backrest is continuous and fully upholstered, providing a plush and decorative appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, gently curved, fully upholstered, and integrated into the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-style, made of wood with carved decorative elements and a smooth, painted or stained finish. Each leg curves outward at the base, adding to the vintage aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid, light-colored fabric with visible tufting on the backrest and a subtle, possibly damask or floral, woven pattern on the seat and cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are five loose cushions: two round, two square, and one cylindrical bolster, all arranged symmetrically along the back and sides of the seat. The cushions are layered for both comfort and decorative effect.
